item.title: A message from the Cafeteria:
item.description: The last day for the cafeteria to be open for the school year is May 20th

item.title: A message from Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: If you are in Grade 8 and enjoyed the Lacrosse Workshop in January, please consider signing up for the upcoming Friendship Games! On May 28, we will be bringing 36 Grade 8 students to St. FX to participate in a day of fun lacrosse games and activities. Interested students are asked to see Mrs. Curtis and Ms. Clouthier outside of the 7/8 Resource Room at morning break.

item.title: A message for 7/8 Track and Field:
item.description: No practice this week. The last 2 practices will be on Monday, May 25 and Monday, June 1. Reminder: You must attend at least 3 out of the 5 practices in order to attend our meet.

item.title: A message from Unity Club:
item.description: Don't forget our Multicultural Day is happening this week! Thursday is the big day, so please scan the QR code on the posters around the school to share about YOUR culture!
